## PR Type

- [ ] Bug report (beta-tester issue — `docs/issues/` only)
- [ ] Feature / fix (maintainer only)
- [ ] Documentation

---

## Beta-Tester Checklist

> **If you are a beta-tester, read this before submitting.**

- [ ] My PR targets **`beta-feedback`** — not `main`
- [ ] This PR contains **exactly one** Markdown file under `docs/issues/`
- [ ] No code, config, or other files were changed
- [ ] I used the `_template.md` and filled in all fields
- [ ] Severity is set correctly (`low` / `medium` / `high` / `critical`)
- [ ] No personal data, real user IDs, or chat content in the logs
- [ ] File is named `YYYY-MM-DD_short-description_yourhandle.md`

---
